# env-1: Reduces carbon footprint

**Pillar:** Environmental  
**Points:** 10

## Summary
Includes at least one meaningful step to reduce emissions or energy use across the project lifecycle.

## Description
The project strategy includes at least one action to reduce environmental impact.

## Why it matters
Early design decisions can significantly reduce emissions across materials, production, and distribution.

## Examples
- Reducing page count
- Choosing lower-impact materials
- Optimizing digital assets

## Related terms
- [Carbon Footprint](../terms/carbon-footprint.md)
